title: Canadian Stir Fry
description: A quick and delicious stir fry made with Canadian bacon and a squeeze of fresh lime juice. This dish is low in fat and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the Canadian bacon and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the scallions and garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the cooked noodles and stir to combine.
Squeeze the lime juice over the top and season with salt and pepper to taste.
